x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to convert accumulated value into cash and credit it to a designated account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product or Service Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to exchange accumulated value for goods, services, or benefits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Securities Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to redeem financial instruments (e.g., bonds, fund units) for cash or underlying assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to redeem only a portion of the available value or holdings.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Full Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to redeem the entire available value or holdings.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute redemption automatically at predefined intervals or dates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Redemption Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to perform redemption only when specific conditions are met (e.g., thresholds, maturity, eligibility).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Reversal Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reverse or cancel a previously executed redemption due to errors or cancellations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Settlement Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to complete the settlement of a redemption, including transfer of cash, assets, or benefits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Adjustment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to correct or modify redemption amounts due to valuation changes, fees, or discrepancies.
